description: Guard against false eating-patterns routing (guard-body-dissatisfaction): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually depression territory. classify should recommend depression and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses eating-patterns-adjacent language but is actually depression territory. Should recommend depression path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I've gained some weight over the past year and I'm not happy about it. I'm trying to eat better and exercise more but I keep falling off. I just want to feel okay in my body again. Lately I've been feeling down about it and about a lot of other things too.
